mainEntity.name: Compare Avvo vs Martindale for New York AI referrals.
mainEntity.text: Compare Avvo vs Martindale for New York AI referrals.

acceptedAnswer.text: Avvo excels in client reviews/ratings for consumer queries; Martindale in peer AV ratings for B2B. Both essential for NY AI synthesis.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: NY AI blends Avvo's volume reviews with Martindale's ethics signals. Avvo faster updates; Martindale prestigious. Complete both. Firms weak in one lose edge. Audit competitors.[3]
